title: Chain-of-Thought Degrades Visual Spatial Reasoning Capabilities of Multimodal LLMs
key_findings: CoT prompting degrades performance in visual spatial tasks
7 out of 8 reasoning models failed to surpass their backbone models
CoT prompting lowers accuracy by an average of 3% across MLMs
MRMs suffer from severe shortcut learning (No-Image++ ablation)

results.figure_1: CoT vs Non-CoT performance of open-source MRMs
results.trend: CoT prompting drops performance across backbones and model scales
results.notable_case: Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking (model with enhanced spatial perception) also showed degradation
